Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
The Pavilion at Star Lake
Burgettstown, PA
Previous Names:
Coca-Cola Star Lake Amphitheatre (Changed after 1999)
Post-Gazette Pavilion at Star Lake (Changed after 2007)
Post-Gazette Pavilion (Changed after 2009)
First Niagara Pavilion (Changed after 2016)
KeyBank Pavilion (Changed after 2019)
S&T Bank Music Park (Changed after 2020)
Seating Capacity: 23100
Venue Type : Outdoor Amphitheater

Total Gigs: 32
  DMB  (30)
  Dave & Tim  (1)
  Dave solo  (1)

Longest Performance:
06.09.06 - Jimi Thing (22:35)

Song Liberations
  6.10.06 – So Right (after 1057 days)
Venue Picture
Description
Star Lake Amphitheatre opened in 1990, 20 miles west of downtown Pittsburgh.

665 Rt. 18
Burgettstown, PA 15021

Songs that made their debut at this venue:
Out of My Hands (6.4.05)
Shotgun (6.10.06)
Gravedigger (full band) (5.30.08)
So Damn Lucky (full band) (5.30.08)
Thank You (Falettinme Be Mice Elf Agin) (full band) (5.30.08)
Money (5.31.08)
Money (That's What I Want) (5.31.08)
Belly Belly Nice (7.14.2012)
